2 |.
Y MrBigBets
1/17 cow plays
Virginia/SMU O 153.5 -110 1u
BYU +2.5 -110 1u
Oregon +18.5 -110 tu
This isnt a 5-10 years ago UVA. Their defense is not as
good as they used to be. SMU has a high powered offense
with multiple playmakers. UVA should also be able to put
up 75 points in this matchup as well
BYU and Texas Tech should be a very competitive game
tonight to say the least. 2 of the better teams in the
country. A super star on each side. | like BYU to at least
cover the spread here and bring it down to the wire
Oregon and Michigan is interesting. My main angle here is
travel and value. Travel is a really slept on factor in college
sports. Its tough for these kids to go on road trips and win
multiple games. Also Michigan is undoubtedly a top team
in the country, but they've finally come back down to earth
lately. It'll be really hard for them to win this game by 20+
